transcript: This young man's name is Grisha. He is the son of a Russian crazy rich. That night, at a discotheque, Grisha had fun with the beautiful women. As usual, every day, Grisha just spends his father's money. When Grisha was with a girl in the car, Grisha asked her to sleep with him. But because that girl declined Grisha's request, he immediately kicked the girl out and left her just like that in the middle of the road. At that time, he was stopped by the police because he was driving a car at speed. When the cop told him to get out of the car, Grisha arrogantly bribed the policeman by throwing a wad of money in his face. Firmly, the policeman refused it and kept insisting Grisha to stop, until the cop was dragged away by Grisha's car and tucked away. A few hours later, Grisha's dad, Pavel, comes to jail. The police chief took pity on Pavel because almost every week, Grisha was always in and out of prison for causing trouble. Seeing the face of his son who was not feeling sorry at all, Pavel was really confused about what else to do. After paying bail to release Grisha, Pavel vented his anger. Since Grisha's mother passed away, he was tired of having to always take care of all these matters alone. But Grisha was still very ignorant and he even peed carelessly and smoked in front of his father. Fed up, Pavel leaves from there. Pavel then confided in his girlfriend, Anastasia. Anastasia is a producer on a TV station show. Hearing Pavel's complaints, Anastasia advised him to consult with a horror film producer she knew. The producer's name is Lev, and he has a lot of creative ideas and maybe he has an idea how to change Grisha. The next day, Pavel and Anastasia came to Lev's office. Lev is seen testing a self-made hanging machine for his latest horror film. After hearing Pavel's story and problems, Lev told him not to worry, because he was used to dealing with bad kids' cases like this. Lev said that a naughty child will quickly change if he gets shock therapy. However, Pavel said that the level of Grisha's delinquency already crossed the line. He asked for a more extreme shock therapy, to change Grisha completely. Hearing the request, Lev got an idea. One night, when Grisha just came out of the discotheque, he was shocked to see his car being towed. Frantically, Grisha chases after his car. But suddenly, from behind, Grisha was shot by a mysterious sniper until he fainted. In the morning, in a horse stable, Grisha is approached by a worker named Artyom. And suddenly, an overseer appeared to take Grisha out and scolded him for being lazy. As a result of the commotion, the noble landowner's son, Alexei, came to give the overseer a whip to whip Grisha. Not long after, Alexei's father appeared. Grisha, who was confused, then told them that he was the son of a rich man who was respected. He vowed to report them to the police. Hearing the word police, they all laughed in surprise, as if they didn't understand what police Grisha meant. The noble man then ordered the overseer to whip Grisha, so as not to be impudent. Luckily, the punishment wasn't too severe. When the noble man leaves, Artyom immediately brings Grisha back to the shed. In the shed, Grisha, who is still confused, immediately ran away from there. The local villagers were confused by Grisha's strange behavior. In the middle of the road, he was stopped by the overseer. Grisha then ran as fast as he could until he fell into the pool. Finished drying off and given a change of clothes, Grisha is angry because his clothes were like sacks. Not only that, Grisha also asked Artyom if there is nobody here who knows about android phones, airplanes, the internet, cars, and Donald Trump. And when Grisha asked what year it was, Artyom answered that it was 1860. Suddenly, the overseer appeared again and brought Grisha to the place of punishment. Because Grisha was trying to escape, Grisha is considered a rebel and will be executed along with other rebels. Saw corpses hanged, and some had their hands cut off before his own eyes, Grisha very scared. Luckily, when Grisha was about to hang, suddenly came a noble princess named Paulina. Then, Paulina told them all to stop it and said that she didn't want the death penalty on her birthday. Soon, Paulina's brother and father came. Thus, a heated argument ensued between the three of them. Temporary, Grisha can only be silent and surrender in fear. Because Paulina kept begging her father, finally the noble man cancelled all death sentences that day. After the punishment was stopped, happily, Artyom thanked Paulina for saving his best friend. But in the midst of the joy, Grisha was just stiff and silent, holding back tears. He did not know what to say or do. This is the first time in his life, Grisha was in a situation between life and death. Above, you can see an eagle flying past them. The eagle continues to fly until it reaches a building, and it turns out that the bird is a drone camera. It turns out, what happened in the ancient village was just a setting made by pavel anastasia and leviticus pavel had rented a village as a shooting location only for the sake of changing grisha's character everything has been carefully planned starting from the professional actors cameras installed all over the village snapper who is ready to anesthetize grisha at any time if there is a problem and even anastasia directly leads the project using her experience as a tv producer during break time the director explained that while in the ancient village the actors were prohibited from wearing modern objects such as rings or earrings even bras and panties had to be removed because in that year they had not yet been invented while other actors are busy briefing, Alexei was making out with an actress named Liza. When they were chatting, the director gave the script for the next scene and told Liza to get ready immediately. While in the shed, Grisha still confused why he could be in the pass. He thought maybe his tow truck last night was a time machine, just like in the movie he had seen. Because there is no way back to the future anymore, Grisha also resigned, he was forced to accept the situation and try to live his days as a horse's caretaker. Starting from sleeping in the stables, eating porridge without side dishes, cleaning horse manure, being whipped, and having to gather leaves for the horse's fodder. Day after day has passed. Now, Grisha is already getting used to life in the village. But there is one thing he really misses, the internet. On the other hand, Pavel looks dilemma. He was confused why there was no change at all in his son's character. Lev then told Paulina to cry. It aims to teach Grisha sympathy or concern. Then, while crying, Paulina confided that she was sad because she was betrothed to a rich, old man. But instead of sympathy, Grisha actually told Paulina to accept the match. After all, if the old rich man dies, his wealth will be passed on to Paulina, that's how Grisha thought. Seeing Grisha's reaction just now, Paulina, Lev, and Pavel were very disappointed. Their plan had failed. The next day, Grisha tells Artyom that he managed to steal a chicken. He didn't care if he was found out by the noble man. Anyway, today he wants to eat chicken meat. Shortly thereafter, when Artyom finished work, he asked where the stolen chicken was. However, Grisha replied that he had finished the chicken himself without wanting to share it with Artyom. In the afternoon, the supervisor gathered all the workers because one chicken was missing. The supervisor then punished one of them randomly, and unfortunately, the chosen one was Artyom. There, Grisha just silent and indifferent, even though his own best friend was being whipped because of what he did. Seeing that reaction, Pavel was again disappointed. Their plan to foster sympathy for Grisha failed. When on the river, Grisha was having fun fishing. Then, Artyom became angry at him because Grisha did not want to admit that he was the one who had stolen the chicken. In the middle of their chat, Grisha accidentally saw Liza's panties. Of course Grisha feels strange, because in this era, there should not be modern underwear like that. Out of curiosity, Grisha wants to see Liza's underwear once again. Luckily, Liza managed to escape. In the evening, Grisha went back to meet Liza to apologize about the incident earlier. He regretted having been impolite to Liza. At that moment, Pavel began to smile. This was the first time he heard his son apologize to someone. That night, when all the villagers were having a party paulina was still trying to win over grisha's heart paulina said that she would rather kill herself in the river than marry an old man she didn't love however grisha even ignores paulina and prefers to chat with liza love then ordered artium to give a code for liza to follow paulina to the river After successfully rescuing Paulina, Grisha then took her to the horse-drawn carriage. On the carriage, Paulina tries to flirt with Grisha. However, Grisha refused and he chose to go to Liza's house to apologize for leaving her earlier. The next day, Lev told Liza that what happened last night was not according to the scenario. Initially, Lev wanted to make Grisha and Paulina fall in love with each other. But Grisha actually fell in love with Liza. Lev then plans to rewrite the script, and from now on, Liza is the female lead, replacing Paulina. While getting ready, Liza told her boyfriend, Alexei, that she got the main role of being the escort for Grisha. Liza asks Alexei not to be jealous, because whatever happens, she promises that she will not fall in love with Grisha. At noon, the nobleman was angry because Alexei was causing trouble in the city. As a result of that deed, the city guards were now heading here to punish Alexei with a whip. Because he did not want his son to be punished, the nobleman then called Grisha. The nobleman asked Grisha to replace Alexei to receive punishment. If Grisha was willing, the nobleman promised to provide a letter of freedom for slavery to Grisha. In the evening, Grisha was flogged to bear Alexei's deed. After receiving punishment, Grisha went to ask for his letter of freedom. Alexei instead pushed and spat at Grisha while saying that Grisha will remain a slave forever. This is the first time Grisha feels how it feels to be cheated. Even though he was hurt, he couldn't fight back. Day after day passes. Grisha and Liza now are getting closer. They both always spend time together and tell each other about their pasts. Until one day, while walking, accidentally Grisha sees the Eagle drone camera above errors and flying around. In the studio, Lev, Anastasia, Pavel, and the rest of the crew panicked. So swiftly, Liza improvised saying that the Eagle above always flies like that. The Eagle has followed Liza since she was little, and is even considered as her guardian angel. Luckily, shortly thereafter, the drone is back to normal. When Grisha wants to take Liza home, they are confused why the horse carriage in the barn is rocking. And as it turned out, Alexei had been having an affair with Paulina. Seeing her boyfriend cheating on her, Liza tries to stay professional. She keeps her act, as if they don't know each other and Liza quickly leaves from there. As a result of the incident, Alexei and Paulina were fired. Because yesterday Liza looked sad sad so tonight grisha wanted to give her a surprise so that liza would be happy again he invited liza to a romantic dinner even if it's only in the shed it's simple but grisha serves liza so gently after dinner they looked at the beautiful stars together at that moment grisha ventured to express his feelings seeing grisha's's genuine concern, Liza's heart slowly starts to melt. They both end up kissing under the beautiful stars. Witnessing this happy moment, Lev, Pavel, and Anastasia were also happy. A few days after being fired, because of hurt, Paulina dismantles Pavel's project. The host was shocked, then said that Pavel had violated human rights because he had tortured his own son. The next day, the police launched an investigation. Seeing the news, Pavel, Lev, and Anastasia then gathered the all crew to devise a re-scenario plan. They make a scenario to make the end of the story a happy ending before the police come. Instantly, Lev got idea to make Grisha become a hero. The next day, the drama starts again. At the moment when Grisha and Liza are alone, Artyom came to tell them that the Mongols were coming to attack, even threatening to burn the whole village. Seeing the fully armed Mongolian troops had taken control of the village, the leader of the Mongol troops then appointed one woman to be his wife. Because he did not accept it, the woman's father tried to fight back. Unfortunately, he was beheaded to death. The leader of the Mondal army then chose one more woman, that is Liza. But instead of being a gentleman who saves his lover like a hero, Grisha precisely even gets scared. Despite Liza's repeated pleas, Grisha keeps going. Inside the studio, everyone is disappointed that the police are about to arrive. Frantically, Anastasia ordered all the crew to tidy things up. Pavel also told Lev to anesthetize Grisha immediately, but Lev refused. He still believes that Grisha will definitely save Liza. In the middle of the debate, they heard Grisha's voice that was praying for help from the eagle that Liza considered as her guardian angel. Grisha prayed for courage to help his lover. Then, bravely, Grisha mounted a horse carrying a stick, then he fought the Mongols and rushed to save Liza like a hero. Just as the two of them were leaving, at the same time, the police came surrounding them. Conley, Anastasia, Pavel, and Lev explained that they were currently shooting a documentary film for Anastasia and Pavel's wedding. The police don't have enough evidence because they can't find Grisha anywhere. Forcely, the police had to believe and then go from there. Meanwhile, Grisha took Liza away as far as possible from the village, until when they came out of the forest, Grisha saw a gas station. Grisha was very confused, and when Liza wanted to be honest to tell all the truth, suddenly from behind a sniper shot Grisha with anesthetic bullets. Grisha then fainted and was taken to the hospital. When conscious, Grisha was told that he had been in a coma for three months because of being hit by a car. At that time, Grisha was shocked and wondering if his whole life with Liza had been just a dream. Grisha go through his day after day as before. He goes to nightclubs and walks in his expensive sports car. But strangely, Grisha is not as happy as before. Without Liza's presence, Grisha's life felt empty. He then apologized and even gave his sports car to the policeman who he had insulted before. Until one night, while drinking at the bar, Grisha accidentally met Paulina and Alexei. Since breaking up with Liza, now the two of them are dating. At first, they wanted to shut up and pretend they didn't know Grisha. But because they couldn't bear it, Paulina and Alexei finally decided to tell the whole truth. The next morning, they accompanied Grisha to Liza's place. Saw the woman he loves so much appear in front of him, Grisha was so happy. It turns out that Liza is not just a dream, Liza is real. Sometime later, Grisha invites Liza to attend his father and Anastasia's wedding. After congratulating them, Grisha said that he already knew everything although pavel had lied grisha was not angry instead he thanked pavel for being a caring father and for turning him into a better person now it seems that grisha has started a new business with liza artium as well as the rest of the crew is a unique business, Grisha was a producer as well as an actor in project drama set to rehabilitate bad boys like the old Grisha, in order to turn into a good boy like current Grisha.
